title: Seishun Complex Music Disc (Bocchi The Rock Opening)
description: Now you can use it as your own music disc
body:
🎸 **Seishun Complex Music Disc Datapack *Bocchi the Rock! Intro Edition***  
Turn your jukebox into a stage no anime OST mods required!  
This datapack replaces the **Otherside** music disc with *Seishun Complex*, the energetic opening theme from *Bocchi the Rock!*.

✨ **Features**  
✅ Replaces *Otherside* with *Seishun Complex* audio  
✅ Custom disc texture: neon pink with guitar silhouette and starburst overlay  
✅ Lore tooltip: “A song of youth, chaos, and complex feelings.”  
🧩 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+  
🎧 Works with vanilla jukeboxes and redstone music setups
